title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released the Nemotron 3 series consisting of Nano, Super, and Ultra models. The models combine hybrid Mamba transformer architecture with Latent Mixture of Experts and MTP to differentiate from other open models.
writeup: The video covers NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 release, which spans three model tiers: Nano, Super, and Ultra. It explains the architecture choices that set these models apart from other open releases: a hybrid Mamba transformer design paired with a Latent Mixture of Experts and Multi-Token Prediction (MTP). The key takeaway is how these components combine across the size tiers to differentiate Nemotron 3 in the open model landscape.
